footer.tagline: Your technology partner for websites, mobile apps, AI, and automation.
footer.ctaText: Talk to us about your project — free, no strings attached.

hero.subtitle: Solusi Sistem helps businesses build websites, mobile apps, AI solutions, and automation — all under one team, shipped fast and built to scale with you.

chips.fullService: One team for every digital need
chips.ownership: You own 100% of the source code
chips.support: Supported all the way to launch

services.title: One team, four digital capabilities
services.subtitle: See a simple example of what we can build for your business.

web.title: Website & Web Apps
web.desc: From company profile sites and landing pages to complex web apps — fast, secure, and built to be extended, from design through deployment.
web.feature1: Modern design, responsive on every device
web.feature2: Fast performance & SEO-friendly from day one
web.feature3: Admin dashboards & API integrations as needed

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.desc: Smooth, intuitive Android & iOS apps for your customers or internal operations — from concept to release on the Play Store and App Store.
mobile.feature1: Natural UI/UX built for everyday use
mobile.feature3: Push notifications, payments, third-party API integrations

ai.title: AI Solutions
ai.desc: Bring AI into your business — customer service chatbots, automated data analysis, and smart features that speed up your team's work.
ai.feature1: Chatbots & virtual assistants trained on your business
ai.feature2: Data analysis & prediction for faster decisions
ai.feature3: AI model integration into your existing systems

automation.title: Automation & Integration
automation.desc: Cut repetitive manual work — connect your business tools (orders, WhatsApp, spreadsheets, CRM) so they run automatically without your team lifting a finger.
automation.feature2: WhatsApp, email, and internal system integrations
automation.feature3: Save your team's time, reduce human error

mobile.title: What would you like to order today?

ai.greeting: Hi! How can I help with your digital project?

chips.mobile: Can you build a mobile app?

replies.pricing: Pricing depends on your project's scope. Let's do a free consultation so we can estimate it properly.
replies.mobile: Absolutely! Our team builds Android & iOS apps from scratch through to store release.
replies.automation: Sure thing — we can connect your business tools so your team's work runs automatically.
replies.timeline: Timelines depend on complexity, usually a few weeks. Let's chat for an accurate estimate.
replies.default: Sounds interesting! Tell us more about what you need, or reach out for a free consultation.

process.title: A clear process from start to finish
process.subtitle: Transparent at every stage, so you always know where your project stands.

consult.title: Consultation
consult.desc: We discuss your needs and business goals together — free of charge.

design.title: Planning & Design
design.desc: We map out the technical plan and UI/UX design for your needs.

develop.title: Development
develop.desc: Our team builds your system with regular progress updates.

launch.title: Testing & Launch
launch.desc: Thorough testing before your system officially goes live.

support.title: Ongoing Support
support.desc: Continued assistance and maintenance after launch.

whyUs.title: A tech partner that understands your business
whyUs.subtitle: Not just a vendor — a long-term partner for your digital growth.

team.title: Multi-Disciplinary Team
team.desc: Web, mobile, AI, and automation handled by one team — no need to coordinate multiple vendors.

stack.title: Modern Technology
stack.desc: We use current, scalable technology so your system lasts and stays easy to extend.

communication.title: Transparent Communication
communication.desc: Regular progress updates and direct access to the dev team, no red tape.

support.title: After-Launch Support
support.desc: We stay by your side after launch — we don't disappear once the project ships.

cta.title: Ready to grow your business with the right system?
cta.subtitle: Talk to us about your needs today — free, no commitment.
cta.whatsappMessage: Hi Solusi Sistem, I'd like to discuss a system/app project for my business.

home.title: Solusi Sistem — Web, Mobile App, AI & Automation Services
home.description: Solusi Sistem helps your business build modern, scalable websites, mobile apps, AI solutions, and automation ready to grow with you.

about.title: About Us — Solusi Sistem
about.description: Meet Solusi Sistem, your technology partner for web, mobile, AI, and automation needs.

contact.title: Contact Us — Solusi Sistem
contact.description: Talk to the Solusi Sistem team about your digital project. Free, no commitment.

about.title: A technology partner for businesses ready to grow
about.subtitle: Solusi Sistem helps businesses make the most of digital technology — from simple websites to complex automation systems.

story.title: Why Solusi Sistem?
story.paragraph1: We believe every business, big or small, deserves a digital system that works exactly as fast and as precisely as it needs to — not a generic solution forced to fit.
story.paragraph2: That's why we built Solusi Sistem as one team fluent in web, mobile, AI, and automation at once, so you only need one partner for your entire digital transformation.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To be a trusted technology partner helping businesses in Indonesia transform digitally, end to end.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: Deliver web, mobile, AI, and automation solutions that are relevant, affordable, and built to last for every client.

values.title: What We Stand For
values.subtitle: The principles that guide how we work on every project.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: We don't cut corners — every system is tested and polished before it reaches you.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We stay current with new technology so our solutions stay relevant long-term.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.desc: We work with you, not just for you — your input shapes the process.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: Honest communication about cost, timeline, and technical limits from day one.

contact.title: Let's talk about your digital project
contact.subtitle: Fill out the form below or reach us directly — our team responds quickly.
